action.reasoning: Observation: iter_17 eval gave mean_r2=0.2445 with linear model and humidity override to training mean, r2_ptend_t=0.3987, r2_radiation=0.788, r2_precipitation=0.3447. The linear model's native humidity predictions were overridden, sacrificing potential positive contribution. Analysis: Removing humidity override may boost mean_r2 if the linear model learned any signal for those dims. Also the model was trained on only 200k subsample; training on more data (1M) should improve. Decision: write evaluate_and_improve_linear.py to estimate val R² of existing linear model without humidity override, and also fit a new Ridge on 1M samples to see if we can get a better model. Then update predict.py accordingly and submit eval.
